> **Privacy note:** PathWise runs entirely in your browser and your data never leaves your device — please don't paste real account numbers or balances; redacted/sample values are fine.

### Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

### To reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Enter values '...'
4. See error

### Expected behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

### Actual behavior

What actually happened instead.

### Environment

- **Browser + version**: e.g. Chrome 126, Firefox 128, Safari 17
- **OS**: e.g. macOS 14, Windows 11, iOS 17
- **Device**: desktop / mobile / tablet
- **App version**: shown in the footer (e.g. v1.0.0)

### Console errors (if any)

Paste any errors from the browser's developer console (F12 → Console tab).

```
(paste here)
```

### Screenshots (optional)

Attach screenshots or a screen recording if they help illustrate the problem.
